projects.name: Ainstein
projects.description: Minkowski's AI-powered colleague. Transforms Minkowski's knowledge (proposals, experts, pricing, positioning) into a usable commercial intelligence layer.
projects.mission: Capture and scale Minkowski's methodology so Ainstein can function independently. Enable one million Einsteins to make history.
primarySkills: build_proposal — proposal support, expert matching, module logic
meeting_reviewer — Jamie transcript analysis, proactive suggestions

folders.01_Clients: All client work: proposals, outcomes, meeting notes, briefs per client
folders.04_Marketing/Pricing: Fee structures, day rates, modular pricing
folders.03_Experts: Expert profiles, team capacity, decision matrix

coreRules: Verify before reporting — check git log, read files, consult memory first
Never invent source material — all facts from Drive or codebase
Reuse before creating — adapt proven material
Challenge assumptions — always ask 'why' and 'what if'
One recommendation per decision — not a menu of options
Distinguish findings from hypotheses — be explicit
Language: Dutch for Minkowski stakeholders, English for external

sessionRituals.opening: State one intention sentence before starting
sessionRituals.closing: Update roadmap, commit changes, push to main

liveComponents: Meeting reviewer skill — independent analysis + proactive suggestions
currentState.openItems: See plans/ainstein-roadmap.md — single source of truth

verifiedConfigurations.slackOAuthScopes: chat:write, reactions:read, users:read, users:read.email, app_mentions:mark, files:write, SocketMode
verifiedConfigurations.githubAutoDeploy: Enabled — every main merge triggers 'Deploy to Ainstein VM'
verifiedConfigurations.driveAIRestriction: Blocked via Google Workspace policy (needs unblocking for MCP access)
verifiedConfigurations.worktreeIsolation: Agents run in isolated git worktrees for parallel mutation safety
verifiedConfigurations.transcriptTruncation: 24k chars (first 12k + last 12k) to prevent token overflow

thomas.name: Thomas Thiadens
thomas.responsibility: Product vision, strategy, source layer curation, Slack workspace setup

claude.name: Claude Code (AI pair programmer)
claude.responsibility: Build features, maintain codebase, research, session closures

nextSteps: Unblock Google Drive AI-policy restriction (for MCP access)
Expand proposal logic (module combos, client segmentation)
Scale: Ainstein sources client briefs, proposes opportunities
